scripts.name: Check pip Virtualenv Updates
scripts.description: Checks one Python virtual environment and emits stable dashboard parser lines.

steps.label: Check pip virtualenv updates
steps.command:
venv_path="{{config.venvPath}}"
case "$venv_path" in "~/"*) venv_path="$HOME/${venv_path#??}" ;; esac
py="$venv_path/bin/python"
"$py" -m pip list --outdated --format=json 2>/dev/null | "$py" -c 'import json,sys
for p in json.load(sys.stdin):
 print("LUDASH_UPDATE %s %s %s" % (p["name"], p["version"], p["latest_version"]))'

scripts.name: Detect pip Virtualenv
scripts.description: Checks whether the configured Python virtual environment is available.

steps.label: Detect pip virtualenv
steps.command:
venv_path="{{config.venvPath}}"
case "$venv_path" in "~/"*) venv_path="$HOME/${venv_path#??}" ;; esac
[ -x "$venv_path/bin/python" ] && "$venv_path/bin/python" -m pip --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo found

scripts.name: List Installed pip Virtualenv Packages
scripts.description: Reports virtualenv packages for package inventory.

steps.label: List pip virtualenv packages
steps.command:
venv_path="{{config.venvPath}}"
case "$venv_path" in "~/"*) venv_path="$HOME/${venv_path#??}" ;; esac
py="$venv_path/bin/python"
"$py" -m pip list --format=json 2>/dev/null | "$py" -c 'import json,sys
for p in json.load(sys.stdin):
 print("LUDASH_PACKAGE %s %s" % (p["name"], p["version"]))'

scripts.name: Update All pip Virtualenv Packages
scripts.description: Upgrades all outdated packages in the configured virtual environment.

steps.label: Update pip virtualenv packages
steps.command:
venv_path="{{config.venvPath}}"
case "$venv_path" in "~/"*) venv_path="$HOME/${venv_path#??}" ;; esac
py="$venv_path/bin/python"
out="$("$py" -m pip list --outdated --format=json 2>/dev/null)"
pkgs="$(printf '%s' "$out" | "$py" -c 'import json,sys; print(" ".join(p["name"] for p in json.load(sys.stdin)))')"
[ -z "$pkgs" ] || "$py" -m pip install --upgrade $pkgs

scripts.name: Update Selected pip Virtualenv Packages
scripts.description: Upgrades the selected packages in the configured virtual environment.

steps.label: Update selected pip virtualenv packages
